# AI Travel Planner - Product Overview

## Project Purpose
AI Travel Planner is a full-stack web application that generates personalized travel itineraries using artificial intelligence. It combines a modern, responsive frontend with a Node.js backend powered by Google's Gemini AI API to create comprehensive travel plans.

## Value Proposition
- **AI-Powered Planning**: Leverages Google Gemini Pro to generate intelligent, personalized itineraries
- **User-Friendly Interface**: Modern, responsive UI for easy trip planning
- **Comprehensive Recommendations**: Provides day-wise itineraries with transport, hotel, and shopping suggestions
- **Budget-Aware**: Generates plans based on user budget constraints
- **Free to Use**: Utilizes free tier of Google Gemini API

## Key Features
- Interactive form-based trip planning interface
- AI-generated day-wise itinerary breakdowns
- Transport and accommodation recommendations
- Shopping and dining suggestions
- Budget-based planning optimization
- Real-time API integration with Google Gemini
- CORS-enabled for cross-origin requests

## Target Users
- Travelers seeking personalized trip planning
- Budget-conscious travelers
- Users wanting AI-assisted travel recommendations
- Anyone looking for quick, comprehensive itinerary generation

## Use Cases
- Planning multi-day vacations
- Creating business travel itineraries
- Generating budget-optimized travel plans
- Exploring new destinations with AI recommendations
- Quick trip planning without manual research
